entry.title: Entry #775 in IN RE: Social Media Adolescent Addiction/Personal Injury Products Liability Litigation, MDL No. 3047
entry.summary: ***TEXT ONLY NOTICE******ALL CASE DOCUMENTS SHALL CONTAIN A PROOF OF SERVICE ON ALL PARTIES WHO DO NOT RECEIVE ELECTRONIC SERVICE THROUGH CM/ECF***NOTICE OF FILING OF CTO AND PUBLICATION OF BRIEFING SCHEDULE (CTO-81) re: pldg. ( 774 in MDL No. 3047, 1 in MN/0:26-cv-02695, 1 in MN/0:26-cv-02699, 1 in MN/0:26-cv-02702) BRIEFING SCHEDULE IS SET AS FOLLOWS: Oppositions due on or before 5/29/2026.Attorneys must be registered to file in the JPML. Please visit our website for Registration Information. Signed by Clerk of the Panel Jessica D. Birnbaum on 5/22/2026. Associated Cases: MDL No. 3047, MN/0:26-cv-02695, MN/0:26-cv-02699, MN/0:26-cv-02702 (CT) (Entered: 05/22/2026)

entry.summary: CONDITIONAL TRANSFER ORDER FINALIZED (CTO-80) - 3 action(s) re: pldg. ( 766 in MDL No. 3047, 1 in MN/0:26-cv-02461, 1 in MN/0:26-cv-02463, 1 in MN/0:26-cv-02464) Inasmuch as no objection is pending at this time, the stay is lifted.
